title: CALL FOR EXPRESSION OF INTEREST FROM SUPPLIERS FOR PROVISION OF GOODS AND SERVICES IN THE FINANCIAL YEAR 2025
description: RAFIKI-SDO invites interested and eligible suppliers and service providers for various goods and services for FY2025. Deadline for submission is 15th December 2024 at 17:00 hours.
